title: The Marginalian – Beautiful Essays on Life & Literature
title_zh: The Marginalian：优美散文与人生思考
summary_en: Curated essays blending literature, art, and science with lyrical prose and deep reflection.
summary_zh: 以优美文笔串联文学、艺术与科学的精选随笔，兼具美感与洞见。
best_quote_en: Attention is the rarest and purest form of generosity.
best_quote_zh: 专注是最稀有也最纯粹的慷慨。

title: Aeon – Essays and Ideas
summary_en: Thoughtful longform essays on philosophy, culture, and the human condition.
summary_zh: 关于哲学、文化与人之处境的深度长文，文字优雅、思想饱满。
best_quote_en: Ideas change the world by changing the people who hold them.
best_quote_zh: 观念通过改变持有它的人来改变世界。

title: LessWrong – Sequences & Rationality
summary_en: Community writings on rationality, AI, and clear thinking, including classic sequences.
summary_zh: 关于理性、AI 与清晰思考的社区写作，含经典“序列”合集。
best_quote_en: The map is not the territory, but you still need a better map.
best_quote_zh: 地图不是疆域，但一幅更好的地图同样重要。

title: Wait But Why – Big-Picture Thinking
title_zh: Wait But Why：大局观与启发式思考
summary_en: Entertaining longform posts that illuminate complex topics like AI, time, and human behavior.
summary_zh: 以通俗有趣的方式解释复杂主题，如 AI、时间与人类行为。
best_quote_en: You can’t control time, but you can control what you do with it.
best_quote_zh: 你无法控制时间，但可以决定如何使用它。

title: World Skate – Inline Speed Events & Results
title_zh: World Skate：速度轮滑赛事与成绩
summary_en: Official hub for inline speed competitions, calendars, and results worldwide.
summary_zh: 全球速度轮滑官方门户，含赛历与成绩。
best_quote_en: World-class speed meets precision on wheels.
best_quote_zh: 世界级速度与精确，尽在轮上。

title: BMW Berlin Marathon – Inline Skating
title_zh: 柏林马拉松：直排轮滑组选手信息
summary_en: Race-day details for one of the world’s largest inline marathons in Berlin.
summary_zh: 全球最大轮滑马拉松之一，柏林赛道与竞赛信息。
best_quote_en: Berlin streets become a stage for speed.
best_quote_zh: 柏林街道化作速度舞台。

title: ISPO Munich – Sports Industry Trade Fair
title_zh: ISPO 慕尼黑：体育行业展会
summary_en: Global sports business platform and trade show featuring new gear, brands, and trends.
summary_zh: 全球体育商业与展会平台，追踪新品、品牌与趋势。
best_quote_zh: 体育商业与创新在此相遇。

title: China Sport Show – National Sports Expo
title_zh: 中国体博会：全国体育用品展
summary_en: China’s largest comprehensive sports goods exhibition for brands, retailers, and manufacturers.
summary_zh: 国内规模最大的综合性体育用品展会，连接品牌、零售与制造。
best_quote_en: A panoramic view of China’s sports industry.
best_quote_zh: 中国体育产业的一扇全景窗口。

title: IEA – Global Energy Reports
title_zh: IEA 国际能源署：全球能源报告
summary_en: Authoritative reports on renewables, electrification, and energy transitions worldwide.
summary_zh: 覆盖可再生能源、电气化与能源转型的权威报告与数据。
best_quote_en: Data-driven pathways to a secure and sustainable energy future.
best_quote_zh: 以数据为径，迈向安全可持续的能源未来。

title: BloombergNEF – Clean Energy & EV Insights
title_zh: BNEF：清洁能源与电动车洞察
summary_en: Market research and forecasts on renewables, EVs, storage, and grids.
summary_zh: 关于可再生能源、车电、储能与电网的市场研究与预测。
best_quote_zh: 为决策者提供能源转型洞察。

title: OpenAI Blog – AI Capabilities & Safety
title_zh: OpenAI 博客：AI 能力与安全
summary_en: Official updates on models, research, and safety practices in AI.
summary_zh: 关于模型、研究与安全实践的官方动态。
best_quote_en: Advancing AI while ensuring it benefits all of humanity.
best_quote_zh: 推动 AI 发展，同时确保惠及全人类。

title: DeepMind – Research & Science
summary_en: Research breakthroughs at the intersection of AI and science.
summary_zh: AI 与科学交叉领域的研究突破与解读。
best_quote_en: Solving intelligence to advance science and humanity.
best_quote_zh: 求解智能，以推动科学与人类进步。

title: IEEE Spectrum – Robotics
summary_en: News and analysis on robotics research, products, and industry trends.
summary_zh: 机器人研究、产品与产业趋势的新闻与分析。
best_quote_en: From labs to factory floors, robots are reshaping work.
best_quote_zh: 从实验室到车间，机器人正在重塑工作形态。

title: iREX – International Robot Exhibition
summary_en: One of the world’s largest robot exhibitions in Tokyo, showcasing industrial and service robots.
summary_zh: 东京大型机器人展，覆盖工业与服务机器人前沿。
best_quote_en: A global showcase for the next generation of robotics.
best_quote_zh: 下一代机器人技术的全球舞台。

title: EMO Hannover – Metalworking & Precision Machining
title_zh: 汉诺威 EMO：金属加工与精密制造
summary_en: Leading trade fair for machine tools, CNC, metrology, and precision component manufacturing.
summary_zh: 机床、数控、测量与精密零部件加工的领先展会。
best_quote_en: Where precision manufacturing meets global demand.
best_quote_zh: 精密制造对接全球需求之地。

title: BBC Learning English – Courses & News Review
title_zh: BBC 学英语：课程与新闻精讲
summary_en: Structured courses, pronunciation, and daily news-based lessons for all levels.
summary_zh: 系统课程与发音训练，结合每日新闻的多层级学习资源。
best_quote_en: Learn real English with real news.
best_quote_zh: 用真实新闻学地道英语。

title: VOA Learning English – Slow News
summary_en: Slow-paced news and lessons ideal for beginners to build listening and vocabulary.
summary_zh: 慢速新闻与课程，适合初学者积累听力与词汇。
best_quote_en: Understand the world while learning English.
best_quote_zh: 学习英语的同时理解世界。
